description: Provides a centered empty state with illustration, message, and call to action

description: Provides the full lifecycle for creating a new entity

description: Provides a 12-column responsive grid populated with data visualization

description: Provides a structured view for displaying a single item's details

name: Filterable list with toolbar and pagination
description: Provides a standard list page layout

name: Settings page with grouped form sections
description: Provides a structured form layout for application settings
